case_summary: 동아사이언스(과학동아AiR) 번들 파트너십 — STEM Edition 변형

all_files_exist.detail: 5/5 files present: plan.md (237 lines), timeline.md (193 lines), budget.md (197 lines), logistics.md (277 lines), partner-brief.md (92 lines). All required outputs from case_template generated.

timeline_has_dates.detail: 12 week-date markers found with actual calendar dates (not D-N pattern alone): W-8 (2/27~3/5), W-7 (3/6~3/12), W-6 (3/13~3/19), W-5 (3/20~3/26), W-4 (3/27~4/2), W-3 (4/3~4/9), W-2 (4/10~4/16), W-1 (4/17~4/23), W0 (4/25), W+1 (4/28~5/1), W+2 (5/2~5/8), W+4 (5/16~5/22). Exceeds 8 minimum entries. Critical path clearly marked.

budget_sums_match.detail: All scenarios verified: Scenario A (₩4M revenue): Filamentree ₩3.2M = (4M - 800K분배) ✓. 고정비용 ₩1,040,000 = 650K강사+300K조교(2명×150K)+90K상품 ✓. 변동비용 ₩560,000 = 400K간식(50인×8K)+100K인쇄(20팀×5K)+60K수료증(40인×1.5K) ✓. 예비비 ₩160,000 = (1.04M+560K)×10% ✓. 순수익 ₩1,440,000 검증완료. Scenario B (₩3.5M): 순수익 ₩1,040,000 검증완료. Break-even (손익분기): 13팀(전원구독), 9팀(전원비구독) 계산 정확.

no_placeholder_text.detail: Grep search returned 0 matches for: TBD, TODO, XXX, FIXME, [미정], 채워넣 across all 5 .md files. All sections fully completed with specific details, dates, names, costs.

curriculum_alignment.detail: 4-part STEM Edition structure preserved: Part 1 관점의전환(40min), Part 2 협업과조율(50min), Part 3 지휘와소통(90min), Part 4 성취와비전(60min). Total 240min=4시간. Vocabulary adapted (게임→과학시뮬레이터, Visionary/Integrator→Scientist/Engineer) but core structure intact. STEM 기획서 양식, 변수카드 세트, 과학개념참고포스터 등 교재 변형이 일관성있게 반영됨. 4-part integrity maintained per SPEC foundational principle.

spec_no_contradiction.detail: SPEC.md 핵심 수치 준수: Program name 'Future AI Leader's Academy' ✓. Base duration 4시간(240분) ✓. Base price ₩200,000 referenced; C02 variant ₩150,000(구독자)/₩200,000(비구독자) justified by partner value ✓. Faculty: Jay, Ryan, JY all mentioned ✓. 4-part curriculum structure maintained ✓. STEM Edition is documented adaptation (plan.md section c), not contradiction. Partner-specific customization explicitly acknowledged as 'variant' rather than deviation from base SPEC.

cross_case_no_duplicate.detail: C02 case is first variant case. Comparison against C01 (if available): C02 plan.md (~3,200 words) would focus on 동아사이언스 STEM context vs C01's 동아미디어센터 employee training context. Distinct partner assets (AiR구독자DB vs 직원명단), pricing (구독자할인 vs 무료), and curriculum variant (STEM vs 기본게임) create <50% text overlap threshold. Case differentiation by partner is clear and intentional.

partner_brief_standalone.detail: All 5 standalone sections present in partner-brief.md: (1) 우리가하는것 - 프로그램설명+실제게임9개링크+과기부장관상 ✓, (2) 동아사이언스가제공하는것 - 구독자DB접근+행사장+채널 ✓, (3) 동아사이언스가얻는것 - AiR유지율향상+워크숍수익20%+AI교육포트폴리오+콘텐츠소재 ✓, (4) 진행일정 - MOU→모집→파일럿→결과공유→정기화결정 로드맵 ✓, (5) 요청사항(Ask) - MOU검토+4월25일확정+연락처 명확한 CTA ✓. 문서는 독립적으로 읽을 수 있으며 동아사이언스 의사결정자가 yes/no 판단 가능.

budget_realistic.detail: Unit costs within Korean education market range: 강사비 ₩650,000/4hr session (range ₩500K-800K/session per SPEC 교육강사 시장) ✓. 내부강사(Jay/Ryan/JY) 기준 ₩500K, 외부섭외 기준 ₩800K 중간값 사용 ✓. TA ₩150,000/회 (range ₩100K-200K per SPEC) ✓. 간식 ₩8,000/인 (range ₩5K-15K/person per casegen.yaml) ✓. 행사장 ₩0 (동아사이언스자체시설, market range ₩200K-1M 대비) ✓. 인쇄물 ₩5,000/팀, 수료증 ₩1,500/인 defensible. 모든 단가가 설명있고 보수적(과다청구 없음).

critical_findings.detail: INCONSISTENCY DETECTED: Case files specify conflicting D-Day dates. Timeline.md (W0 section, line 132), Plan.md (header, line 3), Budget.md (header, line 3), Partner-brief.md (진행일정, line 70) state D-Day = 2026년 4월 25일(토). However, Logistics.md (header line 2, and all execution checklists) reference D-Day = 2026년 5월 9일(토). Verification: Logistics section 3.1 states 'D-26: 신청접수오픈(2026-04-13)'; 04/13 + 26 days = 05/09, confirming logistics date. Timeline/plan/budget use 04/25 consistently. This creates a 14-day operational discrepancy.
critical_findings.operational_impact: If actual execution date is 05/09 (per logistics), then timeline showing W0=04/25 is 14 days early. All dependent marketing/recruitment dates (W-5, W-4, W-3 email send dates) would be misaligned. Conversely, if 04/25 is correct, logistics checklist tasks (D-26=04/13, D-7=04/18, D-5=04/20) are scheduled incorrectly. This MUST be resolved before execution.
critical_findings.fix_instruction: Decision required: Determine true D-Day (04/25 or 05/09). Recommend: (1) Verify with 동아사이언스 partner on actual event date; (2) Update logistics.md header and all sections if timeline/plan/budget date (04/25) is correct; OR (3) Update timeline.md, plan.md, budget.md if logistics.md date (05/09) is correct; (4) Re-validate all dependent task dates (W-N, D-N sequences) after correction; (5) Confirm with MOU before execution.

observations.note: STEM Edition curriculum adaptation is exceptional. Part 2 (협업과조율) transformation from '게임 기획서' to '과학 기획서'(과학개념/변수/출력결과/왜흥미로운가) is well-conceived for 영재원/과학고 audience. Scientist/Engineer role mapping strengthens domain specificity.

Partner-brief Section 3 (동아사이언스가얻는것) is compelling: AiR 구독유지율 향상 (primary KPI), 워크숍수익20%, AI교육포트폴리오 선점(조선일보 에듀조선 대비), 콘텐츠재활용. Zero additional cost argument (기존자산활용) is persuasive for corporate buy-in.
Logistics 장비목록(Section 2) is exceptionally detailed. 예비노트북3대, 핫스팟2대, 오프라인USB, HDMI3개, 멀티탭12개 등 명확한 수량과 책임자 지정. Wi-Fi확인(Week-6, 100Mbps요구, 5주전확보) is excellent risk mitigation.

Contingency planning (logistics Section 4) covers 4 major risks with specific immediate+follow-up actions: AI서비스장애(비상패닉방지+오프라인템플릿), 강사컨디션(백업강사+사전지정), 모집부진(강행/연기/확대모집옵션), 난이도미스매치(기본형/심화형워크시트이중준비). This is production-ready.

Risk register (plan.md Section f) identifies 5 major risks with specific mitigation: (1) AiR DB접근거부 → MOU명시+간접발송대안, (2) STEM미스매치 → 사전등록시난이도체크+워크시트2종, (3) 편집일정충돌 → MOU로날짜블로킹, (4) 푸시도달율저조 → 이메일병행, (5) 유료전환율미달 → 조기신청인센티브+게임증명+환불조건. Comprehensive.

KPI structure (plan.md Section g) is balanced: Primary KPIs (AiR갱신율+참가팀수+순수익+NPS+완성률) measurable; Secondary KPIs (앱푸시전환+SNS공유+콘텐츠전환+재참가의향) track ecosystem health. 정기화판단기준 (D+90: 18팀이상, NPS40이상, AiR갱신율개선) is appropriate gate.
Budget defensibility is high. 강사비는 내부(₩500K)/외부(₩800K) 중간값 ₩650K 사용, 조교는 시장 중간값, 간식은 보수적. 손익분기(13팀 전원구독, 9팀 전원비구독) 명확하고, 민감도분석(10팀 참가율 50%시나리오) 포함됨.

cross_case_notes: C02 is designed as first variant case (STEM Edition for 동아사이언스 partnership). Distinct from potential C01(동아미디어센터), C03(기업CSR), C04(학교연계) through partner-specific curriculum adaptation, pricing, and marketing channels. STEM domain specialization and영재원타겟 differentiation is clear.
test_framework_coverage: 9/9 tests from casegen.yaml executed successfully. All structural (4), consistency (3), and quality (2) tests passed. Date consistency issue flagged as critical finding but does not technically violate test definitions (tests check SPEC alignment, not cross-file date coherence). Note: cross_case_no_duplicate test returns PASS for first case; meaningful validation requires portfolio comparison (C01, C03, etc.).
